# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
|---------|--------------------|
| 1.0.x   | ✅ Yes             |
| < 1.0   | ❌ No              |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability in **marker-command-engine**, please report it responsibly.

**Preferred method:**
- Open a **private vulnerability report** via GitHub (if available), or
- Create a new issue with the title starting with `[Security]`

We will try to respond as quickly as possible.

Thank you for helping keep this project secure.
